candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Not current assets; wrong section.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Balancing line for non-current assets, not target.

variables.notes: Selected the direct reported total for current assets.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet match for cash and cash equivalents.
Cash flow ending cash can reconcile to balance-sheet cash, but balance-sheet cash is preferred.
Cash flow beginning balance is not the period-end cash balance target.
Operating cash flow, not cash balance.

variables.notes: Used the balance-sheet cash balance rather than cash flow statement balances.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities.
Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.
Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.
Wrong section; non-current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet line for short-term debt; best match for current financing debt and excludes lease wording.
Would capture current portion of long-term debt if populated, but here appears blank/zero and is less comprehensive than direct ST debt.
Semantically good, but appears unpopulated in preview.
Cash flow movement, not period-end stock of short-term debt.

variables.notes: Chose a confident balance-sheet label outside the shortlist. It is the clearest reported short-term debt stock and avoids lease liabilities.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities on the balance sheet.
Contains taxes payable only as part of a total, not a specific tax payable line.
Cash flow tax item, not balance-sheet taxes payable.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit short-term taxes payable label even though preview values are blank; labels may still be valid across years.

candidates.why: Only explicit PPE line on the balance sheet; gross PPE is acceptable when total/net PPE is unavailable.
Could include owner-occupied property, but is less explicit and likely only a component/classification.
Not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Realized G/L on Fixed Assets (PPE & Intangibles)
candidates.why: Cash flow reconciliation item, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

variables.notes: Chose a confident balance-sheet label outside the shortlist because it is the explicit PPE line. Gross PPE is used since a cleaner net PPE total is not available.

candidates.why: Direct match for total assets.
Direct match for operating cash flow/net cash from operating activities.
Component/other item, not the total operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Selected the direct reported operating cash flow total.
